description: Create a PR review, submit events for an existing review, or delete a review. submit and delete require review_id.

method.description: create: new review; submit: POST review event (needs review_id); delete: delete pending review (needs review_id).

commit_id.description: SHA for create; required by GitHub when adding inline comments.

event.description: For create: COMMENT, APPROVE, REQUEST_CHANGES, or PENDING. For submit: desired completion event per GitHub API.

comments.description: Inline comments for create (path, position or line, body).

review_id.description: Review database id; required for submit and delete.

thread_id.description: Reserved; GraphQL thread resolution is not implemented in this tool.
